## Description

Please describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request, and which issue or feature they address.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Code style refactoring / Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (vanilla TS/SASS, no abbreviations).
- [ ] I have sorted CSS properties alphabetically and used fluid units (`rem` using `$font-size`).
- [ ] I have verified and tested my changes locally.
- [ ] Accessibility standards (RGAA/WCAG) are fully preserved, including semantic HTML structure,
  focus state retention during DOM redraws, ARIA live region announcements, and contrast ratios.
